description_long: This object is a small bird with a streamlined body, a short conical beak, and a relatively long, straight tail. Its plumage is primarily a muted brownish-gray with subtle variations in shading along the wings and back, and a slightly lighter underside. The head is rounded, and the eyes are positioned laterally, giving it a typical passerine profile. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail feathers are straight and neatly aligned. The legs are slender and appear to be a dull brown or gray color. The overall appearance suggests a common urban songbird, well-adapted to blending into city environments.
description: A small, brownish-gray bird with a conical beak and straight tail, featuring subtle shading and a streamlined body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's full profile, highlighting the conical beak, rounded head, and straight tail.
description_view_1: Frontal view emphasizing the bird's head, beak, and the symmetry of its body and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other lateral side and the smooth contour of the body.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the alignment of the tail feathers and the back of the head and body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled brown and gray with subtle shading and lighter underparts
